pyreportengine
  • Comprehensive example
  • View page source

Comprehensive example

examples/comprehensive_report.py showcases all element types across 6 slides with various formatting options.

python examples/comprehensive_report.py

Slides included

  1. Typography Showcase — 9 cells with font_name, size, color, bold, italic, and panel background colors

  2. Plots Gallery — 6 matplotlib figures in a 2×3 grid

  3. Data Tables — zebra-striped table with engineering data

  4. Dashboard — mix of plots, text panels, and a table

  5. Nested Layouts — two ContainerElements with sub-grids

  6. Detailed Analysis — long-form multi-column text with colored warnings

Output slides

Slide 1 — Typography Showcase:

Slide 2 — Plots Gallery:

Slide 3 — Data Tables:

Slide 4 — Dashboard:

Slide 5 — Nested Layouts:

Slide 6 — Detailed Analysis:
